message:
fix: orbit mission steps, X button overlap, Mission Control click (#5358)

Three demo/UX fixes:

1. Add install steps to all 3 orbit demo missions — "No install
   steps available" was showing because importedFrom.steps was
   missing. Each orbit now has 3 realistic steps.

2. Move X close button above content in mission detail modal —
   was absolute-positioned overlapping the Run button. Now in a
   flex row above the scrollable content.

3. Clicking "Mission Control: Security Stack" demo mission now
   opens the Mission Control dialog (checks context.missionControl
   flag, not just the hardcoded title).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
